title: Reset VPN password
content: To reset your VPN password: open the Acme Identity Portal, choose VPN Access, click Reset Password, and complete MFA. New credentials sync within 5 minutes.

title: Incident SLA definitions
content: P1 SLA: initial response within 15 minutes; resolution target 4 hours. P2 SLA: response within 1 hour; resolution target 8 hours. P3 SLA: response within 4 hours; resolution target 2 business days.

title: Corporate laptop Wi-Fi troubleshooting
content: Forget and rejoin CORP-WIFI, ensure 802.1x profile is installed, reboot, then run Network Diagnostics from the Acme IT menu.
